message:
refactor(core): migrate connection to per-handle Arc<Mutex> MVCC API

Connection (connection.rs):
- Remove commit_write_mutex (global serialization guard) — concurrent
  commit now uses per-handle Arc<Mutex<ConcurrentHandle>> from the
  registry instead of a global write lock.
- Update all concurrent registry access sites from get_mut(&mut reg)
  to get(&reg) → handle.lock() pattern for the shared Arc<Mutex> API
  introduced in the MVCC PageTxnState refactor.
- Update savepoint rollback, commit planning, SSI validation, and
  pending commit page tracking to use the new borrow patterns.
- Fix concurrent commit path to properly handle the case where
  autocommit detaches the transaction handle before commit planning
  tries to pull pending pages (regression fix from earlier session).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
